steps.title: Identify the core claim needing support
steps.content: The underlined sentence's central claim is that “sannin zukai puppeteers could no longer make the profession a full-time career.” This is the critical assertion that requires evidential backing.

steps.title: Find concrete validation of that outcome
steps.content: D directly confirms the claim by showing that existing sannin zukai performers work in amateur troupes with other employment as their primary income source. The other choices either focus on kuruma ningyo rather than sannin zukai, or suggest that sannin zukai costs eventually became manageable, neither of which demonstrates that puppeteers abandoned full-time careers in the profession. That matches choice D — D is correct.
